description_long: This shotgun features a streamlined, metallic body with a long, vented barrel and a robust, industrial appearance. The stock is a folding type with a brown buttpad, providing both stability and portability. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a darker material, likely wood or polymer, contrasting with the metallic receiver and barrel. The fore-end is also brown, matching the stock, and is positioned just below the barrel for steady handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger for safety. Overall, the shotgun combines utilitarian design with practical features suitable for urban environments.
description: A metallic shotgun with a long, vented barrel, folding stock, and brown grip and fore-end, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the folding stock, vented barrel, and brown grip and fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and vent holes along the barrel, with minimal visibility of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the folding stock, vented barrel, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the brown buttpad of the folding stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
